words.definition: Initialism of Fellowship of Reconciliation, any of a number of religious nonviolent organizations, particularly in English-speaking countries.
An accepted metric unit of area equal to 100 square metres, or a former unit of approximately the same extent. Symbol: a.
The digit or figure 1.
A female.
In rhythm, the second half of a divided beat.
Wholly; entirely; completely; totally.
Recently made, or created.
To perceive or detect someone or something with the eyes, or as if by sight.
At the present time.
Beyond all others.

Belonging to; possessed; acquired; proper to; property of; titled to; held in one's name; under/using the name of. Often marks a possessive determiner as reflexive, referring back to the subject of the clause or sentence.
Away from the inside or centre.
A period of time equal or almost equal to a full day-night cycle, being 24 hours long.
To an excessive degree, more than enough indicates that the degree of a quality is more than what is needed or wanted.
Negates the meaning of the modified verb.
Of an object, concept, relationship, etc., having existed for a relatively long period of time.
To obtain; to acquire.
A surname.
The terminal point of something in space or time.
To pronounce.
To put down, to rest.
A deity or supreme being; a supernatural, typically immortal, being with superior powers, to which personhood is attributed.
Belonging to per, their . Gender-neutral third-person singular possessive adjective, coordinate with gendered his and her.
Distant; remote in space.
To physically place .
Initialism of direct inward dialing. [The ability to make an external telephone call to an internal extension within an organization.].
The amount of time that some being has been alive, or that some thing has been in existence, as measured from its birth or origin until the present or until some other given reference point.
The fruit of the fig tree, pear-shaped and containing many small seeds.
Have/has.
An instance of a certain standardized college admissions test in the United States, originally called the American College Test.
The substance constituting Earth's atmosphere: a gaseous mixture of nitrogen, oxygen, and various trace gases.
A tool with a toothed blade used for cutting hard substances, in particular wood or metal.
Owed or owing.

The conscious production or arrangement of sounds, colours, forms, movements, or other elements in a manner that affects the senses and emotions, usually specifically the production of the beautiful in a graphic or plastic medium.
Used to negate or invert the meaning of the following adjective. More properly written as the prefix non-.
The digit or figure 6.
A heraldic symbol consisting of a pair of outstretched wings, often conjoined at their shoulders.
One's male offspring.
The colour of the setting sun, blood, and strawberries; the colour which is evoked by the longest visible wavelengths , and a primary additive colour.
In a direction away from the speaker or other reference point.
To move swiftly.
To stop living; to become dead; to undergo death.
The highest or uppermost part of something.
A set or group with ten elements.
To request or petition.
The ocean; the continuous body of salt water covering a majority of the Earth's surface.
To attempt; to endeavour. Followed by infinitive.
To incise, to cut into the surface of something.
To even the slightest extent, at all.
A respectful term of address to a man of higher rank or position, particularly:.
Petroleum-based liquid used as fuel or lubricant.

Money or goods collected by a government to fund itself and its services, for example by levying a charge on income, purchases , property or harvest, other than that money which is collected by the government in exchange for specific goods .

A wheeled vehicle that moves independently, with at least three wheels, powered mechanically, steered by a driver and mostly for personal transportation but relatively smaller than a truck/lorry and a bus.
An organ through which animals see .
The star that is closest to the Earth.
Sexual activity, usually sexual intercourse unless preceded by a modifier.
To join or unite so as to increase the number, augment the quantity, or enlarge the magnitude, or so as to form into one aggregate.

Matter in an intermediate state between liquid and plasma that can be contained only if it is fully surrounded by a solid ; it can condense into a liquid, or can become a solid directly by deposition.
Gone; gone by; gone away; passed; passed away.
Desflurane.
Help; assistance; succor, relief.
A sanatorium.

A covered motor vehicle used to carry goods or persons, usually roughly cuboid in shape, Depending on the type of van, it can be bigger or smaller than a pickup truck and SUV, and longer and higher than a car but relatively smaller than a truck/lorry or a bus.
Free from or lacking moisture.
Yarns coiled on a spun-yarn winch.
The portion of the upper human appendage, from the shoulder to the wrist and sometimes including the hand.
To know how to.
Suitable; proper.

Initialism of Ehlers-Danlos syndrome. [Any of a group of inherited connective tissue disorders caused by a defect in the synthesis of collagen, and resulting in abnormally elastic skin, joints, muscles, etc.].
To consume by putting it into the mouth and swallowing it.
Remaining after expenses or deductions.
The station code of Prince Edward in Hong Kong.
To be in a position in which the upper body is upright and supported by the buttocks.
A binary operator composite of NOT OR; negation of OR function.
A mammal of the family Canidae:.
An electrical connection which connects two or more layers on a printed circuit board or an integrated circuit.
A quantity obtained by addition or aggregation.
The part of a living thing that carries genetic information.
Carrying more fat than usual on one's body; plump; not lean or thin.
The atmosphere above a given point, especially as visible from the surface of the Earth as the place where the sun, moon, stars, and clouds are seen.
A time period of indeterminate length, generally more than one year.
A beam of light or radiation.
A line of objects, often regularly spaced, such as seats in a theatre, vegetable plants in a garden, etc.
A violation of divine will or religious law.
Second, ¹⁄₆₀ of a minute.

From a place, hence.
A bounding straight edge of a two-dimensional shape.

The period of time that has already happened, in contrast to the present and the future.
Short in length of time from the present.
To act in a manner such that one has fun; to engage in activities expressly for the purpose of recreation or entertainment.
The dimensions or magnitude of a thing; how big something is.
Without doubt, certainly.

A set of intended actions, usually mutually related, through which one expects to achieve a goal.
With no or few possessions or money, particularly in relation to contemporaries who do have them.

A large, highly organized military force, concerned mainly with ground operations.
An advance or movement made from one foot to the other; a pace.
One of the many pieces of paper bound together within a book or similar document.
An ache or bodily suffering, or an instance of this; an unpleasant sensation, resulting from a derangement of functions, disease, or injury by violence; hurt.
A website.
A long dowel or plank protruding from the ground; a fencepost; a lightpost.
Any compound which yields H+ ions when dissolved in water; an Arrhenius acid.
To cease moving.
That is not free of charge; that costs money.
Weaponry, weapons.
A male given name from Latin of biblical origin.

Opposed to something.
An area of land set aside for environment preservation or recreation.

Taking a long time to move or go a short distance, or to perform an action; not quick in motion; proceeding at a low speed.

Free of flaws or imperfections; unsullied.

Easily giving way under pressure.

Tired, weary.

A musical composition with lyrics for voice or voices, performed by singing.
A common substance, chemically consisting mainly of sodium chloride , used extensively as a food ingredient, seasoning, condiment, and preservative.
A place on the coast at which ships can shelter, or dock to load and unload cargo or passengers.

Any small, natural and bright dot in the sky, most visible in the night or twilight sky. This sense includes the planets, but it is now sometimes used in exclusion of them due to influence from the technical astronomical sense.
Something to be sat upon.
Two similar or identical things taken together; often followed by of.
A long time.
A round or irregular patch on the surface of a thing having a different color, texture etc. and generally round in shape.

The partly frozen, crystalline state of water that falls from the atmosphere as precipitation in flakes; also, the falling of such flakes; and the accumulation of them on the ground or on objects as a white layer.

Rock that is ground more finely than gravel, but is not as fine as silt , forming beaches and deserts and also used in construction.

An imaginary line around which an object spins or is symmetrically arranged .

An architectural element having the shape of an arch.
The course of a story, comprising a series of incidents which are gradually unfolded, sometimes by unexpected means.
A special and possibly random event, typically activated by clicking on an object.
A set of clothes to be worn together, now especially a man's matching jacket and trousers , or a similar outfit for a woman.
To apply a force to so that it comes toward the person or thing applying the force.
Extremely annoying or frustrating.
cause, interest or account.
Old.
To close, in various senses.
A small and rather deep area of fresh water, as one supplied by a spring, or occurring in the course of a stream or river; a reservoir for water.
